name: first_run
label: First Run
description: Indicates if the application is running the first time

name: auto_remove_old_checks
label: Auto remove old checks
description: Automatically delete checks older than the configured number of days once per day

name: auto_remove_old_logs
label: Auto remove old logs
description: Automatically delete logs older than the configured number of days once per day

name: share_enabled
label: Enable Sharing
description: Allow users to share checks via public links

name: rca_enabled
label: Enable RCA
description: Root Cause Analysis (DOM diff) for failed checks. Requires checks to carry DOM snapshots. Overridden by the SYNGRISI_RCA environment variable when set.

name: sso_protocol
label: SSO Protocol
description: Protocol used for SSO (oauth2 or saml)

name: sso_entry_point
label: SSO Entry Point
description: URL of the Identity Provider (IdP) entry point

name: sso_issuer
label: SSO Issuer
description: Entity ID of the Identity Provider

name: ai_triage_enabled
label: Enable AI Triage
description: Classify failed checks with a vision LLM (verdict, confidence, reason)

name: ai_triage_provider
label: AI Triage Provider
description: Model provider for AI Triage (type, baseUrl, apiKey, model)

name: cors_embed
label: CORS & Embed
description: Credentialed cross-origin API access (e.g. Accept baselines from Jenkins Allure while logged into Syngrisi). Managed via Admin → CORS & Embed.
